_note: Demo rep account seeds — INTENTIONALLY EMPTY. Phase 1 originally seeded a handful of real-rep accounts (Byron Donalds, Bernie Sanders, Ron DeSantis, Donalds campaign) with a shared demo password so reviewers could exercise the rep-posting UI. Those were retired because posting under a real politician's name and photo without authorization is impersonation — even in a demo context, screenshots can circulate and create defamation / false-light exposure. The platform engagement loop is now seeded entirely through the citizen-led polls feature on unclaimed rep pages (any subscribed citizen can start a poll, vote, comment). Real reps onboard manually via civicview@civicview.app until the verified-rep flow (ID.me + identity check) ships.
_history: If you need to restore the original seeded accounts for local development, the git history at HEAD~ contains the previous payload.

accounts._note: Internal-use test rep — same account ID Jeffrey created in prod manually. Re-listing here so the seed top-up branch fills owner_state / owner_district / role on the existing row whenever NULL. Required for the Congress filter chip on /polls to find this rep's polls (the chip matches branch='congress' which the backend computes from owner_district). Email + password intentionally placeholder strings; the production row already has a real password set, and seed only tops up NULL fields so these never overwrite credentials.
